cards.name: Sarn Ford
cards.quote: At Sarn Ford the river keeps the western gate.

cards.name: Eagle's Eyrie
cards.quote: High on the eyrie the Eagles keep a lonely watch.

cards.name: Sabotage Port
cards.quote: The harbor's watch is weakened where tide and shadow meet.
cards.actionEffect: The target port is sabotaged, and any warships <sprite name="ws"> there are driven away.

cards.name: Destroy Fortifications
cards.quote: Stone walls fall at the last to fire and weariness.
cards.actionEffect: An enemy PC loses one step of fortification.

cards.name: Visions in the Mirror
cards.quote: What the mirror reveals is not soon forgotten.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal unseen hexes equal to Mage <sprite name="mage">, up to 7.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: Arthedain
cards.quote: Arthedain remembers its kings in the wind.

cards.name: Bay of Forochel
cards.quote: The Bay of Forochel lies under a hard and ancient cold.

cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.quote: At dawn the dark yields, though not willingly.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Stars
cards.quote: Under the stars the weary road is less forlorn.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Hope <sprite name="hope"> to all Elves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Durin's Day
cards.quote: On Durin's Day the mountain door may yet remember.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Hope <sprite name="hope"> to all Dwarves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Sun
cards.quote: The sun lays bare what shadow would conceal.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.quote: When long shadows fall, old fears wake first.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.quote: When Ulmo stirs, the deep remembers wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.quote: Some lore sleeps long before it is fit to be read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 <sprite name="mage"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: AriseRidersOfTheoden
cards.quote: At Theoden's call, riders are awakened from grief.
cards.actionEffect: Allied cavalry <sprite name="ca"> units in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Blade Reforged
cards.quote: A blade once broken may yet be made whole.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex gains +1 <sprite name="commander">, loses Fear <sprite name="fear">, and gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> for 2 turns.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: Annuminas
cards.quote: The stones of Annuminas wait in silence for the hand that shall wake them.

cards.name: CarasCelairnen
cards.quote: Beneath its boughs, Caras Celairnen keeps memory bright and still.

cards.name: Edhellond
cards.quote: The broken haven still hears the sea in its sleep.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: Fornost lies like a fallen crown upon the North.

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Under the hard sky of Forochel, even silence has a stern voice.

cards.name: GladdenFields
cards.quote: The Gladden Fields lie hushed, where water and reed keep old secrets.

cards.name: LondDaerEnedh
cards.quote: Lond Daer still leans upon the river, as though the age of ships were not yet done.

cards.name: Lake Town Arsenal
cards.quote: Lake-town stores iron as a poor folk store hope.
cards.actionEffect: Gain +1 <sprite name="iron">, +1 <sprite name="steel">, and +1 <sprite name="timber">.

cards.name: Under Elendil's Banner
cards.quote: Elendil's banner is still a pledge to the Faithful.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Nenya
cards.quote: Nenya keeps a hidden gleam against fading days.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied PC: hide it for 2 turns and grant Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to nearby allied units.

cards.name: Lorien Belt
cards.quote: The belt of Lorien is woven for passing in secret.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: BountyfulSeason
cards.quote: When the year is kind, even the poor have a full board.
cards.actionEffect: Gain +2 <sprite name="gold">, +1 <sprite name="timber">, +1 <sprite name="leather">.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Woven by the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim weave cloaks that hide even longing.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Stand of Dol Amroth
cards.quote: Dol Amroth stands as the sea meets iron.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: On the Pelennor
cards.quote: Upon the Pelennor the horn is answered by valor.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: that army gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2 turns), and if it contains cavalry <sprite name="ca"> it also gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Vilya
cards.quote: Vilya's light endures where wounds would not close.
cards.actionEffect: Allied characters in radius 1 are fully healed, and Foam on the Water is cast in radius 2-4 depending on the caster's Mage <sprite name="mage"> level.

cards.name: DreamsOfNumenor
cards.quote: Dreams of Numenor drift westward on the salt wind.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units on shore/water-adjacent tiles gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Beorning Toll
cards.quote: At the Beorning toll, all travelers pay in coin or courtesy.
cards.actionEffect: Fortify the caster for 1 turn and halt enemy units in the same or adjacent hexes.

cards.name: Ancient Edge
cards.quote: An ancient edge is not soon made dull.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.quote: A border well watched is a border half held.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent <sprite name="agent"> or Commander <sprite name="commander"> skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander <sprite name="commander"> in your hex if present.

cards.name: Arrows of the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim loose their arrows like leaves in storm.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: deal moderate damage and, if the target is on forest terrain, apply Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Ambush from Edhellond
cards.quote: From Edhellond the coast may strike before the cry is heard.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage; if the caster is Hidden <sprite name="hidden">, also apply Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.quote: The Winelords know that fair raiment may hide a firmer will.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and gain 2 <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Rain
cards.quote: Rain washes ash from the road and teaches patience.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: remove Burning <sprite name="burning"> from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: FirstLightOnTheThirdDay
cards.quote: On the third day, the first light is the sweetest.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: grant Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn) and Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn) to all Human and Dunedain units within radius 3.

cards.name: FordOfBruinen
cards.quote: Bruinen's ford grants passage only on the river's terms.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: allied units on shore/water tiles in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn), allied non-army characters there gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and enemy units there are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Swift as the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim go swift and soundless among the leaves.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn), Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and if on a forest tile also remove Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: Treasures of Lasgalen
cards.quote: In Lasgalen, treasure is kept where root and bough defend it.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Elf characters in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn), and one wounded allied character in your hex heals a moderate amount.

cards.name: The Horn Calls
cards.quote: When the horn calls, fear is put to shame.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Human and Dunedain units in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn), and enemy units in your hex gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Shielded
cards.quote: A shield is but a promise made in wood and steel.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and if the target has Fear <sprite name="fear"> remove it.

cards.name: War spoils
cards.quote: Spoils won by war are often bitter to count.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.quote: The green herb heals where the blade has left its hurt.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Set Out at Once
cards.quote: He that lingers loses the advantage of the road.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Bound in Hithlain
cards.quote: Hithlain binds lightly, yet fast as a spoken oath.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and if on a forest or mountain tile also gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Mounts
cards.quote: Swift mounts carry hope ahead of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.quote: Ithilien keeps its skill beneath leaf and shadow.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Token of the Woodland Realm
cards.quote: A token from the Woodland Realm bears more than memory.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Provided by the Elves
cards.quote: The Elves give with grace, not haste.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.quote: Mithril's light outlasts the pride of kings.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.quote: The Northmen stand as weathered timber in the storm.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.quote: The deep remembers wrath when Ulmo stirs.
cards.actionEffect: All naval <sprite name="ws"> or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: A Light in Dark Places
cards.quote: Even a small light is hated by the dark.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn) and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">/Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Behind Noldo Shields
cards.quote: Behind Noldo shields, the old pride of the Elves still stands.
cards.actionEffect: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: Gift of the Evenstar
cards.quote: The Evenstar is a gift given while the West still has breath.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character gains Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns) and removes Fear <sprite name="fear">/Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.quote: In green things the earth remembers how to mend.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned">/Burning <sprite name="burning">.

cards.name: Heir to Barahir
cards.quote: The heir of Barahir bears a line that the years could not break.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn); caster gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Hope Reborn
cards.quote: Hope is reborn when all lesser things are spent.
cards.actionEffect: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

cards.name: Heart of the Mountain
cards.quote: The heart of the mountain beats slow, but never dead.
cards.actionEffect: At a mountain or population center, allied Dwarf commanders in your hex and adjacent hexes gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1) and Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1); enemy commanders there gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1).

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.quote: In rough hides, much that is dear may be concealed.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn); caster gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Joining the Rangers
cards.quote: To join the Rangers is to take the long road and the long watch.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.quote: When the call goes out, old loyalties wake.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Reclaiming Erebor
cards.quote: To reclaim Erebor is to call the Dwarves home again.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Dwarves in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn) and Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.quote: A palisade hastily raised may still hold a night of dread.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Silmarilion
cards.quote: The Silmarillion is lore too bright for careless hands.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.

cards.name: TheAwakeningOfTheoden
cards.quote: When Theoden awakes, the courage of Rohan wakes with him.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: permanently gain +1 <sprite name="commander">, remove Fear <sprite name="fear">, and gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2 turns).

cards.name: TheGreyCompany
cards.quote: The Grey Company rode from the North in silence, bearing the hope of the Dunedain.
cards.actionEffect: Choose allied Dunedain in radius 3 and distribute +1 <sprite name="commander">, +1 <sprite name="agent">, and +1 <sprite name="emmissary"> among them.

cards.name: Traps
cards.quote: A snare laid unseen waits longest of all.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn) and Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: TrollsHoard
cards.quote: A troll's hoard is won by greed and spent by need.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn); your nation gains +1 <sprite name="gold"> and +1 <sprite name="mithril">.

cards.name: VisionsOfTolEressea
cards.quote: Visions of Tol Eressea are a westward dream the Wise do not cast aside.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Elf in your hex gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Well-equiped Army
cards.quote: Well equipped hosts are less shaken by the first terror.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Kindle Dawnfire
cards.quote: Kindle dawnfire, and even fear may find a name.
cards.actionEffect: Kindle Dawnfire. Unique event logic variant based on Dawn.

cards.name: Ward Against the Eye
cards.quote: A ward set against the Eye is a shield for the unmarked way.
cards.actionEffect: Ward Against the Eye. Unique event logic variant based on VisionsOfTolEressea.

cards.name: Steward's Muster
cards.quote: At the Steward's muster, the people remember old duty.
cards.actionEffect: Steward's Muster. Unique event logic variant based on RalliedMen.

cards.name: Hallow the Road
cards.quote: Hallow the road, and the night grows less bold.
cards.actionEffect: Hallow the Road. Unique event logic variant based on GoingOnAnAdventure.

cards.name: Oath of the Westfold
cards.quote: The Westfold keeps its oath when the reckoning comes.
cards.actionEffect: Oath of the Westfold. Unique event logic variant based on FirstLightOnTheThirdDay.

cards.name: Release Character
cards.quote: No chain forged by mortal hand endures forever.
cards.actionEffect: Release one captive currently held by this character in the same hex.

cards.name: Ask Ransom
cards.quote: Ransom is the coin by which many doors are opened.
cards.actionEffect: Demand ransom for a captive in the same hex. If the captive's owner pays, the captive is released.

cards.name: Free Character
cards.quote: Freedom is a gift best given before the last hour.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to free an allied captive of the same nation in the same hex. Enemy agents hold captives more securely, and critical failure is dangerous.

cards.name: Bears
cards.quote: The bears come with the old wrath of the wild.

cards.name: Beasts
cards.quote: The beasts of the wild heed neither horn nor hedge.

cards.name: Dunadan Rangers
cards.quote: The Dunedain keep the waste roads under secret watch.

cards.name: Mounted Dunadan Rangers
cards.quote: On swift horses the Dunedain pass like wind and shadow.

cards.name: Rangers
cards.quote: The Rangers hold the wild ways while others sleep.

cards.name: Wardens Of Annuminas
cards.quote: The wardens of Annuminas keep watch over a dead crown.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: Buckland
cards.quote: At Buckland the evening stillness is kept like a lamp in the window.

cards.name: Michel Delving
cards.quote: Michel Delving stands small to the eye, yet stout in the keeping of the Shire.

cards.name: Imladris
cards.quote: In Imladris grief is borne as song, and not as burden.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree keeps faith with the road, though the years grow wary.

cards.name: Rivendell
cards.quote: Rivendell keeps its own light when the East is dim.

cards.name: Lindon
cards.quote: Lindon remembers the first westward light.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: TheNorthDowns
cards.quote: The North Downs stand as old sentinels over the road.

cards.name: Anfalas
cards.quote: Anfalas faces the sea with weathered hearts.

cards.name: Anduin
cards.quote: The Great River carries the memory of all kingdoms.

cards.name: Swordmen
cards.quote: Swordmen stand in line, and the dark breaks on them.
